## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Datagrid and GrowthX to discuss project progress, performance updates, and next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/bXt4pY1A15viSyLCkyxAKnPsq66vBXds?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Agreement with Marcel progressing; PandaDoc sent but not yet signed by Tiago](https://fathom.video/share/bXt4pY1A15viSyLCkyxAKnPsq66vBXds?tab=summary&timestamp=65.0)
  - [Performance stable: 831 articles, Google traffic steady, LLM traffic increasing](https://fathom.video/share/bXt4pY1A15viSyLCkyxAKnPsq66vBXds?tab=summary&timestamp=235.0)
  - [New work streams defined; refreshes to begin next week](https://fathom.video/share/bXt4pY1A15viSyLCkyxAKnPsq66vBXds?tab=summary&timestamp=443.0)
  - [Next sync rescheduled to Thursday 9am ET due to AU conference](https://fathom.video/share/bXt4pY1A15viSyLCkyxAKnPsq66vBXds?tab=summary&timestamp=504.0)

## Topics

### Project Agreement Status

  - [PandaDoc agreement sent, awaiting Tiago's signature](https://fathom.video/share/bXt4pY1A15viSyLCkyxAKnPsq66vBXds?tab=summary&timestamp=83.0)
  - [Vivek to get agreement signed by end of day](https://fathom.video/share/bXt4pY1A15viSyLCkyxAKnPsq66vBXds?tab=summary&timestamp=258.0)
  - [Workstreams shared, including automatic editorial and refreshes](https://fathom.video/share/bXt4pY1A15viSyLCkyxAKnPsq66vBXds?tab=summary&timestamp=176.0)
  - [GrowthX team to review internally and plan next steps](https://fathom.video/share/bXt4pY1A15viSyLCkyxAKnPsq66vBXds?tab=summary&timestamp=144.0)

### Performance Report

  - [Close to previous traffic highs](https://fathom.video/share/bXt4pY1A15viSyLCkyxAKnPsq66vBXds?tab=summary&timestamp=277.0)
  - [Google traffic stable, LLM traffic increasing](https://fathom.video/share/bXt4pY1A15viSyLCkyxAKnPsq66vBXds?tab=summary&timestamp=285.0)
  - Non-branded traffic healthy: \#1 spot for 157 keywords
  - [Most clusters improved or stable; AI-powered automation slightly low](https://fathom.video/share/bXt4pY1A15viSyLCkyxAKnPsq66vBXds?tab=summary&timestamp=316.0)
  - [Construction, AI agents, document extraction performing well](https://fathom.video/share/bXt4pY1A15viSyLCkyxAKnPsq66vBXds?tab=summary&timestamp=326.0)
  - [New clusters: Real estate and manufacturing most promising](https://fathom.video/share/bXt4pY1A15viSyLCkyxAKnPsq66vBXds?tab=summary&timestamp=351.0)
  - [Mining articles unexpectedly strong](https://fathom.video/share/bXt4pY1A15viSyLCkyxAKnPsq66vBXds?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)
  - [Government cluster underperforming](https://fathom.video/share/bXt4pY1A15viSyLCkyxAKnPsq66vBXds?tab=summary&timestamp=365.0)

### LLM Traffic

  - [Improved overall](https://fathom.video/share/bXt4pY1A15viSyLCkyxAKnPsq66vBXds?tab=summary&timestamp=383.0)
  - [ChatGPT highest referral source, as expected](https://fathom.video/share/bXt4pY1A15viSyLCkyxAKnPsq66vBXds?tab=summary&timestamp=387.0)

### Link Building Update

  - [Several new links built over past month](https://fathom.video/share/bXt4pY1A15viSyLCkyxAKnPsq66vBXds?tab=summary&timestamp=412.0)
  - [Target audience-focused websites](https://fathom.video/share/bXt4pY1A15viSyLCkyxAKnPsq66vBXds?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Links to homepage and blog pages](https://fathom.video/share/bXt4pY1A15viSyLCkyxAKnPsq66vBXds?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)
  - [Statistics articles continue to attract backlinks](https://fathom.video/share/bXt4pY1A15viSyLCkyxAKnPsq66vBXds?tab=summary&timestamp=433.0)

### Plan for Next Week

  - [Focus on refreshes as easiest starting point](https://fathom.video/share/bXt4pY1A15viSyLCkyxAKnPsq66vBXds?tab=summary&timestamp=443.0)
  - [Present plan for refreshes and new content development](https://fathom.video/share/bXt4pY1A15viSyLCkyxAKnPsq66vBXds?tab=summary&timestamp=447.0)
  - [Discuss programmatic work streams, requiring web development support from Toric team](https://fathom.video/share/bXt4pY1A15viSyLCkyxAKnPsq66vBXds?tab=summary&timestamp=447.0)

### Team Availability

  - [Vivek out of office for next two weeks](https://fathom.video/share/bXt4pY1A15viSyLCkyxAKnPsq66vBXds?tab=summary&timestamp=492.0)
  - [Mara and Mika available for support](https://fathom.video/share/bXt4pY1A15viSyLCkyxAKnPsq66vBXds?tab=summary&timestamp=492.0)

### Meeting Rescheduling

  - [Next sync moved to Thursday 9am ET due to AU conference](https://fathom.video/share/bXt4pY1A15viSyLCkyxAKnPsq66vBXds?tab=summary&timestamp=504.0)
  - [Kaitlin in Nashville Sunday through Friday for event](https://fathom.video/share/bXt4pY1A15viSyLCkyxAKnPsq66vBXds?tab=summary&timestamp=504.0)
